ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Solution_Engineering', ISCHANGED(Status__c), OR( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Actively Working'), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Completed') ), OR( ISPICKVAL(Qualification_Score__c, ''), Sum_of_Actions__c = 0 ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You cannot progress to “actively working” or “completed” without an action and Qualification Score being populated
